features: 🌞【Supper Bright &Ambience Solar Lights Outdoor Garden】Looking for adding lighting and outdoor entertaining ideas for your summer night? Quntis outdoor solar stake lights give off beautiful 8 Awn starburst Shadow on the ground. The 3200K bright and warm white led light will add a welcoming glow and cozy ambience. So now let's install these solar lights to light up your way at night, while creating beautiful shadow patterns and adding a finishing touch to your yard, patio and lawn.

🍀【Auto On/Off Stake Lights Solar Powered】Say goodbye to monotonous and dark gardens! Quntis landscape path lights is completely powered by sunlight. These solar landscape lights can auto light 8-10hrs during the night after a 4-6hrs full charging under the direct sunlight during the day. Perfect for house warming and gardening, providing sufficient brightness for outdoor places and last throughout the nights.

🌞【IP65 Waterproof &Commercial Solar Lights Outdoor】Thanks to IP65 Waterproof level, Quntis LED solar walkway lights withstand heavy snow, or rain. Use these LED solar lights to decorate your front Yard, Garden, Lawn, Path, Patios, Pathways, Driveway, Walkway, Sidewalk, Villa, Landscape, Terrace without weather worry. Besides, these solar driveway lights adopts thickened, corrosion-resistant ABS materials, which protects the inner led while providing beautiful brightness effect.

🍀【Bigger Solar Panel &Longer Lighting Path Lights】Quntis walkway lights Solar Panel adopts bigger and >95% monocrystalline silicon, the light conversion rate is increased by 30%. Premium solar panel and build-in 700mAh higher capacity battery can effectively collect and store more solar energy, continuous illumination up to 10 hours. Especially in cold weather or rainy days, our outdoor solar yard lights can still store more electricity.

🌞【Easily Installed Solar Landscape Lights】 2 Minutes installation! No tools required, just twist the solar driveway lights roof and remove insulating strip, assemble each part, then insert the spike into soil.【 Note: If the soil is solid, pls dig a hole in the ground before inserting the spike.
description: Product Description Upgraded Monocrystalline Silicon Solar Panels for 20% Faster Charging No tools required for installation, 100% solar powered. Solar garden lights turn on automatically at night and turn off automatically in the morning. Automatically provides 8-10 hours of nighttime lighting. Larger and Brighter - Unique Starburst Projections Previous page Next page Previous page Next page Previous page Next page 1 Path | Walkway 2 Yard | Patio 3 Garden | Lawn 4 Garage | Driveway Light Source Solar Color of Light 3200K Warm White Lumen 30 Lumen Charging Time 4-6 Hours (in sunlight) Lighting Time 8-10 Hours (in full sunlight) Diameter of the Lighting 2M Attention1 Please install the outdoor solar light in direct sunlight and make sure there is no eaves, trees and other obstacles above the solar panel. Attention2 The default mode of the product is off mode. Press the power button to turn it on when using the product. Attention3 If you want to check if the product works properly. Turn on the product by pressing the power button and then cover the solar panel with your hand or place it in the dark during the day. Attention4 Since direct sunlight is not enough, it is normal for the solar garden lights to take longer (at least 6-8 hours) to charge on cold or cloudy days. Attention5 The ability of outdoor sunlight to produce optimal illumination depends on unavoidable factors such as sunlight intensity, geographic location, weather, and season. Quntis Garden Lights Two Styles Available 3200K Warm White Light Colour 3200K Warm White&RBG Elegant Starburst Projection Style Simple Star Shape 12.7*43.84 CM Sizes 14.7*40 CM 700mAh Battery Capacity 500mAh 4-6H Charge Time 4-6H 8-10H Use Time 8+H Waterproof IP65 3200K Warm White Light Colour Multicolour Elegant Starburst Projection Style B0D7NLYBTS 12.7*43.84 CM Sizes 30*90CM 700mAh Battery Capacity / 4-6H Charge Time / 8-10H Use Time / Waterproof IP65 Previous page Quntis Garden Lights Learn More Quntis Garden Lights Learn More Next page
